title: Colorable Forretress Shulker Boxes
description: A combination data pack/resource pack that allows the coloring of Shulker Box Forretress.
body:
**Colorable Forretress Shulker Boxes** is a combination datapack/resource pack that adds the ability to dye **Shulker Box Forretress** by using any dye on it. This change is purely cosmetic and does not affect gameplay. Want to remove the dye? Simply use a water bucket!

- **Shulker Box Forretress** can now be dyed using any of the ingame dyes, resulting in an appropriately-colored shulker box modeling those in base Minecraft. 
- **1.7 UPDATE:** Forretress is now dyed using Cobblemon's Cosmetic Slot! Have your Forretress hold any dye to update its color, and remove it to get the base color again. 


**BIG SHOUTOUT TO** [Emery319](https://modrinth.com/user/Emery319) for contributing to the upkeep of this pack! They contributed to the v3 update. 

⚠️As of version 3 of this pack, this should not interfere with any other packs that alter Cobblemon color forms, however, older versions of this pack may do so. 

**Questions or Comments?**

Be sure to join Cobblemon's Discord and share your thoughts in "Ian's things" under the form channel named "content-zone-help"
